nodes.title: Create a multiplayer game with mobile controls
Create a game where you choose your character
Create a game or app about sleep
Create a racing game with AI opponents

nodes.author: Anton Bergåker
nodes.description: The King has been cursed! If he falls asleep he will die! Recruit peasants and farmers to give him a steady supply of coffee to inject into his bloodstream.
nodes.title: Caffeine King

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: A game where you customize a flying car and try to beat a map filled with colorful balloons. The catch is that everything you do drains energy from the car, so you better hurry.
nodes.title: Car

nodes.author: Jonas Nygren
nodes.description: Don’t let the virus get to you! Jump, dash and shoot to survive as long as possible, avoiding the swarm of incoming virus particles.
nodes.title: Corona Shooter

nodes.author: Nils Lorentzon
nodes.description: A browser gimmick used for good, this game makes you move a pop-up browser window to quickly locate and eliminate the disease. When you’ve acquired a target through the sniper scope, click it with your mouse.
nodes.title: Corona Sniper

nodes.author: Albin Kroon
nodes.description: We’re not safe from the disease anywhere, not even in space. Inspired by the arcade classic Asteroids, you control a spaceship in order to destroy all incoming projectiles.
nodes.title: Corona in Space

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: Play VR darts in the dark. In this game the player has to memorize dart board positions and throw darts after the lights go out.
nodes.title: Dartness

nodes.author: Albin Kroon
nodes.description: A horde of monsters are hiding in the dark. Luckily you’re armed with a powerful flashlight.
nodes.title: Diaglow

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: Control the Mars rover in VR through a virtual screen. You work at NASA’s Mission Control Center and suddenly an alarm goes off.
nodes.title: Flat Mars

nodes.author: Filip Palmqvist
nodes.description: Gotta catch that Mars bar! A unique interpretation of the hackathon’s theme.
nodes.title: Get the Mars

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: Practice social distancing in this webcam-based dodge-the-bullets game. If you catch too many virus particles, the game is over.
nodes.title: Hand

nodes.author: Albin Kroon
nodes.description: You are lost on Mars and need to find missing parts to rebuild your space ship.
nodes.title: Lost on Mars

nodes.author: Jonas Nygren
nodes.description: Fish using magnets! Uses fish simulations with mathematical models inspired by nature.
nodes.title: Magnet Fishing

nodes.author: Jacob S.
nodes.description: Explore Mars and plant flowers!
nodes.title: Mars Rovering

nodes.author: Arvid Sandin
nodes.description: A top-down maze game with a twist... Every move you make is delayed by half a second, and touching the walls equals losing.
nodes.title: Maze Delay

nodes.author: Max Gabrielsson
nodes.description: A custom game engine built from the ground up. Maybe there’s an upcoming platform game built with the engine…
nodes.title: OpenGL Game Engine

nodes.author: Anton Bergåker
nodes.description: Design your own personal petrock to strategically beat this physics-based sidescroller. The game is literally rock and roll.
nodes.title: Petrock Simulator

nodes.author: Peter Öhlmér
nodes.description: In this game you jump on platforms falling down from the sky, trying not to get crushed.
nodes.title: Platform Jumper

nodes.author: Jacob S.
nodes.description: Why sleep when you can spend the night solving puzzles? Help the factory worker stay alert and survive through his tough working conditions by utilizing the classic “arm shake”.
nodes.title: Puzzle Solving Factory

nodes.author: Anton Bergåker
nodes.description: Battle it out against other rovers on the red planet!
nodes.title: Rover Wars

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: A web-based first-person shooter where the players fight eachother to see who first scores 10 points. The game contains 5 unique maps which are cycled through after each win.
nodes.title: Shooter

nodes.author: Jacob S.
nodes.description: Pop bubbles with your candles, but the game is over if you let both flames go out.
nodes.title: Sisyphus Bubble Popper VR

nodes.author: Nils Lorentzon
nodes.description: Learn fun facts about sleep, a perfect introduction to the theme of this hackathon.
nodes.title: Sleep Quiz

nodes.author: Albin Kroon
nodes.description: An app which tracks sleeping patterns by making use of sensors in your smartphone, for example microphone and gyroscope.
nodes.title: Sleep Tracker

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: Survive as long as possible in this VR horror game. You wake up in the middle of the night standing on your bed with a camera in your hand as you see a man floating towards you from a distance.
nodes.title: Sleepn’t

nodes.author: Lucas Strömberg
nodes.description: The ship MS Ever Given has just been freed from the Suez Canal. Are you going to risk getting caught in the stampede?
nodes.title: Suez Canal Game

nodes.author: Filip Palmqvist & Måns Wenning
nodes.description: A simple Phaser game based of the iOS game Flight Control.
nodes.title: Suez Control

nodes.author: Nils Lorentzon
nodes.description: Black holes, planets and gravitation. What could possibly go wrong?
nodes.title: The Void

nodes.author: Anton Bergåker
nodes.description: Keep your torch and campfire lit if you are to survive the night.
nodes.title: There’s Something In The Dark

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star, but there’s more…
nodes.title: Twinkle, Twinkle, Twinkle

nodes.author: Albin Kroon
nodes.description: This web app uses Markov chains to procedurally generate new tweets from your favorite Twitter users.
nodes.title: Twitter Markov

nodes.author: Anton Bergåker
nodes.description: Prevent the virus from spreading on the bus! You are a driver for UL and there’s a pandemic. Use state of the art technology to keep the bus clean from infection.
nodes.title: Vibus

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: Agar.io but it’s in 3D and underwater. In this multiplayer game you absorb other players to become as big as possible.
nodes.title: Water Game

nodes.author: Carl Enlund
nodes.description: Start your day off with a strong motivational quote. Personally nothing makes me more pumped up than hearing “Always succeed” or “You can do it”.
nodes.title: Wise

nodes.author: Anton Bergåker
nodes.description: The fishing industry is very lucrative, but all fishing rods are massively upsold. Fish using alternative methods.
nodes.title: Xtreme Xplosive Fishing

nodes.author: Anton Bergåker
nodes.description: A zombie shooting game where one player fights hordes of zombies strategically placed by a second player. The first player plays the game using an Xbox controller, and the second player uses a smartphone to place the zombies.
nodes.title: Zombie Invasion
